ADD.HINT: Click to add a new animatin
ADD.LABEL: Add Animation

AUTOFIT.HINT: Will attempt to automatically fit the visible parts of the sprite within the token's area.
AUTOFIT.LABEL: Auto-Fit

CLEAR.HINT: Click to remove all currently configured animations
CLEAR.LABEL: Clear Animations
CLEAR.MESSAGE: Are you sure you want to do this?

CONFIG.CONFIRMREMOVE: Are you sure you wish to remove this animation?
CONFIG.DESCRIPTION: Use the following options to add, remove, and update pre-configured animations for this token.

IMPORT.BULKWARNING: This will overwrite existing animations.  Are you sure?
IMPORT.LABEL: Import Animations

MESH.DESCRIPTION: The following options can be used to adjust the display of the underlying SpriteMesh used for this token or tile, should you need to adjust the scale or positioning relative to the actual placeable object's selectable area, in order to fit larger animations.

SHOWOUTLINE.HINT: If enabled, will outline the underlying sprite mesh on which this object's texture is drawn.
SHOWOUTLINE.LABEL: Show Mesh Outline

CONFIG.NAME: Name

REMOVE.MESSAGE: Are you sure you wish to remove {name}?
REMOVE.TITLE: Remove Animation

TOOLTIPS.EXPORT: Export the current animations as JSON
